ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instruction */,
  "syntax" TEXT /* Syntax of the instruction */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Meaning of the instruction */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format type (R, I) */,
  "opcode" TEXT /* Opcode of the instruction */,
  "funct" TEXT /* Function code for R-type instructions */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage of the instruction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created or last updated the instruction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course content */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (open, closed, in progress) */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the instructor's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of account creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last account update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (active, dropped, completed) */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress in the course (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quizzes" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the quiz is associated with */,
  "quiz_title" TEXT /* Title of the quiz */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks for the quiz */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the quiz */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the quiz */,
  "attempts_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of attempts allowed */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions or guidelines for the quiz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks allocated for the question */,
  "options" TEXT /* Multiple-choice options (if applicable) */,
  "correct_option" INTEGER /* Correct option (if the question is multiple-choice) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (easy, medium, hard) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Is the question mandatory? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_questions_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who answered */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz the response belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Text of the student's answer */,
  "marks_awarded" INTEGER /* Marks awarded for the response */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken by the student to answer */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Number of the attempt */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the instructor */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Is the response correct? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES quiz_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assignment */,
  "resources" TEXT /* Links to resources or materials related to the assignment */,
  "is_team_assignment" INTEGER /* Is the assignment for a team? */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Size of the team if the assignment is a team assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being submitted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student submitting the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade awarded for the submission */,
  "submission_url" TEXT /* URL or file path of the submission */,
  "is_late" INTEGER /* Is the submission late? */,
  "instructor_comments" TEXT /* Instructor comments on the submission */,
  "resubmission_allowed" INTEGER /* Is resubmission allowed? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, instructor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the role active? */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of role creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last role update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
